[2m[38;5;239m╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
[0m [32m// Copyright (c) 2025, the R8 project authors. Please see the AUTHORS file[39m
 [32m// for details. All rights reserved. Use of this source code is governed by a[39m
 [32m//[39m [32mBSD-style[39m [32mlicense[39m [32mthat[39m [32mcan[39m [32mbe[39m [32mfound[39m [32min[39m [32mthe[39m [32mLICENSE[39m [32mfile.[39m
 [34mpackage[39m com.android.tools.r8.config;

 [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.AndroidResourceConsumer;
 [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.AndroidResourceProvider;
 [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.ClassFileConsumer;
 [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.DataResourceConsumer;
 [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.DesugarGraphConsumer;
 [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.DexFilePerClassFileConsumer;
 [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.DexIndexedConsumer;
 [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.GlobalSyntheticsConsumer;
 [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.ProgramConsumer;
 [34mimport[39m com.android.tools.r8.SyntheticInfoConsumer;
 [34mimport[39m java.util.function.Consumer;

 [32m/**[39m
 [32m *[39m [32mConfiguration[39m [32minterface[39m [32mfor[39m [32mconsumer[39m [32msettings.[39m
 [32m *[39m [32mThis[39m [32mfollows[39m [32mInterface[39m [32mSegregation[39m [32mPrinciple[39m [32m(ISP)[39m [32mby[39m [32mseparating[39m
 [32m *[39m [32moutput[39m [32mconsumer[39m [32mconfiguration[39m [32mfrom[39m [32mother[39m [32msettings.[39m
 [32m *[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m<p>Benefits:[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m<ul>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<li>Clear[39m [32mcontract[39m [32mfor[39m [32moutput[39m [32mhandling</li>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<li>Easier[39m [32mto[39m [32mimplement[39m [32mcustom[39m [32moutput[39m [32mstrategies</li>[39m
 [32m *[39m   [32m<li>Better[39m [32mtestability[39m [32mwith[39m [32mmock[39m [32mconsumers</li>[39m
 [32m *[39m [32m</ul>[39m
 [32m */[39m
 [34mpublic[39m [34minterface[39m [34mConsumerConfiguration[39m {

   [32m//[39m [32m==========[39m [32mProgram[39m [32mConsumer[39m [32m==========

[39m   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mthe[39m [32mprogram[39m [32mconsumer[39m [32mfor[39m [32moutput.[39m [32m*/[39m
   [33mProgramConsumer[39m [33mgetProgramConsumer()[39m;

   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mtrue[39m [32mif[39m [32ma[39m [32mprogram[39m [32mconsumer[39m [32mis[39m [32mset.[39m [32m*/[39m
   [34mboolean[33m hasConsumer()[39m;

   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mthe[39m [32mDEX[39m [32mindexed[39m [32mconsumer[39m [32mif[39m [32mapplicable.[39m [32m*/[39m
   [33mDexIndexedConsumer[39m [33mgetDexIndexedConsumer()[39m;

   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mthe[39m [32mDEX[39m [32mfile[39m [32mper[39m [32mclass[39m [32mconsumer[39m [32mif[39m [32mapplicable.[39m [32m*/[39m
   [33mDexFilePerClassFileConsumer[39m [33mgetDexFilePerClassFileConsumer()[39m;

   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mthe[39m [32mclass[39m [32mfile[39m [32mconsumer[39m [32mif[39m [32mapplicable.[39m [32m*/[39m
   [33mClassFileConsumer[39m [33mgetClassFileConsumer()[39m;

   [32m//[39m [32m==========[39m [32mResource[39m [32mConsumers[39m [32m==========[39m

   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mthe[39m [32mdata[39m [32mresource[39m [32mconsumer.[39m [32m*/[39m
   [33mDataResourceConsumer[39m [33mgetDataResourceConsumer()[39m;

   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mthe[39m [32mAndroid[39m [32mresource[39m [32mprovider.[39m [32m*/[39m
   [33mAndroidResourceProvider[39m [33mgetAndroidResourceProvider()[39m;

   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mthe[39m [32mAndroid[39m [32mresource[39m [32mconsumer.[39m [32m*/[39m
   [33mAndroidResourceConsumer[39m [33mgetAndroidResourceConsumer()[39m;

   [32m//[39m [32m==========[39m [32mSpecial[39m [32mConsumers[39m [32m==========[39m

   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mthe[39m [32mglobal[39m [32msynthetics[39m [32mconsumer.[39m [32m*/[39m
   [33mGlobalSyntheticsConsumer[39m [33mgetGlobalSyntheticsConsumer()[39m;

   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mtrue[39m [32mif[39m [32ma[39m [32mglobal[39m [32msynthetics[39m [32mconsumer[39m [32mis[39m [32mset.[39m [32m*/[39m
   [34mboolean[33m hasGlobalSyntheticsConsumer()[39m;

   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mthe[39m [32msynthetic[39m [32minfo[39m [32mconsumer.[39m [32m*/[39m
   [33mSyntheticInfoConsumer[39m [33mgetSyntheticInfoConsumer()[39m;

   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mthe[39m [32mdesugar[39m [32mgraph[39m [32mconsumer.[39m [32m*/[39m
   [33mDesugarGraphConsumer[39m [33mgetDesugarGraphConsumer()[39m;

   [32m//[39m [32m==========[39m [32mMetadata[39m [32mConsumers[39m [32m==========[39m

   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mthe[39m [32mbuild[39m [32mmetadata[39m [32mconsumer[39m [32mfor[39m [32mD8.[39m [32m*/[39m
   Consumer<?> getD8BuildMetadataConsumer();

   [32m/**[39m [32mReturns[39m [32mthe[39m [32mbuild[39m [32mmetadata[39m [32mconsumer[39m [32mfor[39m [32mR8.[39m [32m*/[39m
   Consumer<?> getR8BuildMetadataConsumer();

   [32m//[39m [32m==========[39m [32mLifecycle[39m [32m==========[39m

   [32m/**[39m [32mSignals[39m [32mcompletion[39m [32mto[39m [32mall[39m [32mregistered[39m [32mconsumers.[39m [32m*/[39m
   [34mvoid[33m signalFinishedToConsumers()[39m;
 }

[2m[38;5;239m╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
[0m Do you want to create [1mConsumerConfiguration.java[0m?
 [38;5;153m❯[39m [38;5;246m1.[39m [38;5;153mYes[39m
   [38;5;246m2.[39m Yes, allow all edits during this session [1m(shift+tab)[0m
   [38;5;246m3.[39m No

 [38;5;246mEsc[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mcancel[39m [38;5;246m·[39m [38;5;246mTab[39m [38;5;246mto[39m [38;5;246mamend[39m
